name: The Flying House
original_name: トンデラハウスの大冒険
overview: Corky, Angey, and Justin are playing hide and seek in the woods when a sudden storm appears and they come upon a house in the woods. They go inside and meet Professor Bumble and his Solar Ion Robot, SIR. They discover the house is a flying time machine and a sudden mishap send them into the past where they end up witnessing events from The Bible's New Testament as they keep trying to get home.

trailers.title: THE FLYING HOUSE Teaser: Every Saturday on ABS-CBN!
